runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - v8.11.70 Dashboard Navigation Contrast Recheck
coveredSurfaces: Dashboard left navigation active link computed color blue-700
Dashboard left navigation inactive link computed color slate-600
Dashboard server cards and resource summary remain rendered

expertAssessments.rationale: Production dashboard left navigation labels are readable after the anchor reset specificity fix. Active and inactive links compute to expected blue/slate colors.
v8.11.70 was deployed through the GitLab semver tag pipeline and Vercel production reports the expected commit and tag.
The regression is covered by a static CSS contract test and validated in a real browser on production.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage reported effective=19.0897 USD, billed=0.0000 USD for the current billing period after v8.11.70 deploy; no unexpected billed usage observed.

artifacts.label: Vercel v8.11.70 dashboard nav contrast fixed

completedImprovements.title: Vercel production dashboard left navigation text contrast regression
completedImprovements.evidence: Vercel v8.11.70 Playwright recheck shows active nav color lab(36.9089 35.0961 -85.6872) and inactive nav color lab(35.5623 -1.74978 -15.4316) on white background.

completedImprovements.title: Global anchor reset no longer overrides Tailwind text utility colors in production
completedImprovements.evidence: src/app/global-effects.css deployed in v8.11.70 and verified on Vercel production.

notes: Release decision is go for the tested dashboard navigation contrast scope.
Skipped AI and observability surfaces were not affected by the CSS anchor reset and were intentionally left out of this targeted recheck.
